name: Street Scene Limousine
recent_news: BBB file opened 2006; business 'under review,' not BBB accredited; some customer reviews allege scam complaints. No school-district contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Very small Thousand Oaks limo/livery shop, classified as special-needs by NAICS proxy but no evidence of K-12/SPED contracts or school-bus fleet. Not a credible Summit tuck-in; reputational red flags (BBB 'under review,' Yelp scam complaints) further weaken fit. Pass.

name: Island Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or operational news found. A David M. Hood of Somers Point/Ventnor NJ passed away Jan 2021, but identity match to this firm not confirmed; status of company unclear.
fit_notes: Tiny PO-box-registered livery in Ventnor City. No verifiable school-bus or SPED contract evidence; possible defunct/inactive given owner namesake obituary. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Obrien Limousine
recent_news: No web presence, no recent news, no school-district contract evidence found. Address 64 2nd Ave, Secaucus is a small residential/mixed-use parcel.
fit_notes: Sub-scale Secaucus livery operator with no verifiable yellow-bus or SPED school-district book. Not a credible Summit tuck-in; likely owner-operator car-service rather than school transportation contractor. Pass.

name: Salem Limousine
recent_news: Operates as 'Salem Auto Livery Co.' from 712 W 3rd St, Dayton; BBB-categorized as charter bus / limo service. Owner Mark R. Stubbs. No school district contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Family-owned Dayton livery/charter operator (d/b/a Salem Auto Livery). Phone matches record. No evidence of school-bus or SPED routes; primarily limo/charter. Not aligned with Summit's yellow-bus tuck-in thesis; pass unless deeper diligence finds SPED/Medicaid work.

name: Handicap Transportation Inc
recent_news: Listed as Salem-area special-needs/disabled transportation provider in Yellow Pages directories; 3850 Croisan Creek Rd S is a residential/home-business parcel, suggesting owner-operator paratransit van service. No school district contract evidence.
fit_notes: Likely owner-operator NEMT/paratransit van service in Salem, OR, not a school-bus contractor. Could be tangential SPED/NEMT play but at ~11 employees and home address registration, sub-scale for Summit tuck-in. Pass.
